NAV.TAGLINE: Angular, frontend architecture, technical leadership and product-minded delivery.

HIGHLIGHTS.TITLE: Product focus, architecture thinking and reliable execution.

JOBS.TITLE: Senior Frontend Software Engineer
DESCRIPTION: Working as a senior frontend engineer on high-impact initiatives for the insurance and services platform.
Contribution to new project architecture with Angular, TypeScript, Module Federation and Nx.
Strong collaboration with agile teams and focus on scalable product evolution.

JOBS.TITLE: Senior Frontend Developer
DESCRIPTION: Frontend development with Angular and TypeScript across multiple enterprise projects.
Strong autonomy, agile teamwork and continuous improvement of both interface and code quality.

JOBS.TITLE: Senior Frontend Developer
DESCRIPTION: Focused on frontend analysis and development for digital solutions using a modern stack.
Delivered interfaces with maintainability, usability and sustainable evolution in mind.

JOBS.TITLE: Senior Frontend Developer
DESCRIPTION: Worked on frontend initiatives with Angular and TypeScript in a demanding business environment.
Helped shape solutions that were more organized, predictable and easier to evolve.

JOBS.TITLE: Full Stack Developer
DESCRIPTION: Built projects with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, Node.js, PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
Strong experience in analysis, development and support for robust software solutions.

JOBS.TITLE: Web Developer
DESCRIPTION: Back-end and database development with Intersystems Caché.
Frontend work with JavaScript, HTML, CSS and ERP improvements based on client needs.
